events.description: I am driving on a collector road with two lanes in each direction. I am driving behind a black car, which is driving in front of me. The black car is driving straight. I am driving straight behind it. I cross an intersection with a green light. I keep driving behind the black car. There is a pedestrian crosswalk, but I do not stop for it. There are no other road users around.

The ego-vehicle drives straight in the right lane of a two-lane road, approaching an intersection with a red light. It stops at the stop line, waits for a crossing vehicle to clear the intersection, and then proceeds forward while remaining within the same lane.

The ego vehicle remains in the right lane throughout the video, maintaining a steady speed and staying within its lane boundaries. There are no lane changes, lane wanderings, or interactions with other vehicles that would alter its lane position.

I am driving straight on a two‑lane road with a dedicated left‑turn lane, approaching a signalized intersection. I slow down and come to a complete stop behind a white van in the same lane, maintaining proper lane discipline throughout the sequence. No lane changes or deviations occur.
The ego vehicle remains stationary behind the white van at the traffic light, then proceeds through the intersection and onto the highway ramp, following the white van while staying within its lane.
The ego vehicle remains stationary at a red light in the right lane of a two‑lane road, maintaining its position without any lateral movement.
The traffic light turns green, and the ego vehicle proceeds straight through the intersection while staying within the right lane, exercising caution as it crosses the pedestrian crosswalk.
After clearing the intersection, the ego vehicle continues forward in the right lane of the two‑lane road, maintaining a steady course as the road begins to curve to the left.
As the road curves left, the ego vehicle slows down and navigates the bend carefully, remaining centered in the right lane without deviating from its lane markings.

I am driving on a collector road with two lanes in each direction and a shared turning lane in the center. I am in the middle of a three‑lane road, with a solid white line to my left and a broken white line to my right. The road is straight. I am driving behind a white sedan, and the traffic light turns green. I maintain a safe distance from the vehicles in my adjacent lanes. I drive straight through the intersection while maintaining a safe distance from the vehicles ahead of me. I am driving safely and following all the traffic rules.

From 0.0 to 12.0 seconds, the ego vehicle remains within its lane, following the black pickup truck ahead. The lane lines are clear and the vehicle maintains a steady position without crossing any lane markings. There are no lane changes or lane wanderings observed; the vehicle simply continues forward in the same lane.

The ego-vehicle remains in the middle lane of the three-lane road, maintaining its position without crossing any lane markings as it proceeds straight through the intersection after the light turns green.
The ego vehicle initially drives straight along the road, maintaining its lane position.
The ego vehicle slightly turns to the left to avoid a black object on the right side of the road, temporarily deviating from its lane.
After passing the object, the ego vehicle returns to driving straight and resumes keeping within its lane.
The ego vehicle maintains its position within the lane throughout the entire clip, following a black SUV and stopping at the intersection without any lane changes or deviations.

I am driving straight on a three‑lane road, and the road markings are clearly visible. I am positioned in the rightmost lane, following a black SUV, and I am maintaining a safe distance from the vehicle ahead. A white car is visible in the leftmost lane, and I am keeping a safe distance from it as well. I am driving safely and following all the traffic rules.
I drive straight through the intersection and continue on a single‑lane, two‑way road while keeping a safe distance from the stopped vehicles in the opposite lane.
I am driving straight on a three‑lane highway, remaining in my lane and following the car ahead without crossing any lane lines.

I am driving straight on a three‑lane road in the middle lane, following a black SUV that is stopped at a red light. I come to a stop behind it while staying within my lane, maintaining a safe distance from the vehicle in front and the vehicles in the adjacent lanes. I remain vigilant, monitoring my surroundings for any sudden movements or changes in traffic conditions.
The ego-vehicle remains in the rightmost lane throughout the video, maintaining a steady pace behind the red truck ahead. There are no lane changes, drifting, or crossing of lane markings observed.
The ego vehicle remains in the right lane, maintaining a steady position and following the blue SUV ahead without any lane changes or deviations.

I am driving straight in the right‑turn‑only lane on a three‑lane road, approaching an intersection. I slow down and stop at the intersection, waiting for the traffic light to turn green. I keep my vehicle within my lane, avoiding any lane changes or lane wanderings. I stay attentive to the traffic light and the surrounding traffic, maintaining a safe distance from other vehicles.

The ego vehicle remains in the rightmost straight-only lane, maintaining lane discipline as it approaches and stops at the intersection, with no lane changes or wanderings observed throughout the entire clip.
The ego vehicle remains stationary at the intersection, waiting for the traffic light to turn green. It stays within its lane, showing no signs of lane changes or wandering.
As the traffic light turns green, the ego vehicle begins to move forward, crossing the intersection. It continues to stay within its lane, maintaining a steady and controlled path.

The ego vehicle remains within its lane throughout the sequence, following the vehicle ahead while maintaining a safe distance. There are no lane changes or lane‑wandering events; the vehicle consistently stays between the lane markings.
